compressed_prompt: write song lyrics on socio-economic issue; english, all lowercase; no commas
response:
the alarm clock screams
another day of chasing dreams
that dance just out of reach
a concrete beach

the screen glows with a perfect life
a filtered cut of someone's strife
while i count every single dime
and borrow time

(chorus)
the rent is climbing up the stairs
while hope is sold in shares
this treadmill's moving faster
a silent disaster
the gap's a canyon wide
with nowhere left to hide
just spinning in the grind
a ghost left behind

the diploma's just a faded page
a minimum wage cage
the dream's a heavy load
on a broken road

they say just pull yourself up high
but they don't see the cloudy sky
the weight beneath your feet
the bitter sweet

(chorus)
the rent is climbing up the stairs
while hope is sold in shares
this treadmill's moving faster
a silent disaster
the gap's a canyon wide
with nowhere left to hide
just spinning in the grind
a ghost left behind

(bridge)
the factory's a ghost
what matters most?
a number in a line
a fading sign
the world is automated
and we are left deflated

(outro)
just spinning in the grind
a ghost left behind
just spinning in the grind
a ghost left behind
